name: Chicken Flautas
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Finely shredded or chopped, cooked chicken
2 cups Shredded Monterey Jack or cheddar cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the shredded chicken, Pace Thick & Chunky Salsa, sliced green onions, and ground cumin in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Heat about 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a small skillet over medium heat until hot but not smoking.
3. Quickly fry each tortilla in the hot oil for about 2 seconds on each side. Remove from the oil and place on paper towels to drain excess oil.
4. Spoon 1 tablespoon of the chicken mixture and 1 tablespoon of cheese down the center of each tortilla.
5. Roll the tortillas tightly around the filling, securing them with a wooden pick.
6. Place the rolled tortillas seam-side down on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 400°F for about 18-20 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
8. Serve warm with guacamole and additional Pace Thick & Chunky Salsa.
